stories.title: US launches fresh strikes as Iran closes Strait of Hormuz
stories.summary: The strikes follow an attack on a Cyprus -flagged vessel travelling through the critical waterway.

stories.title: US senator and close Trump ally Lindsey Graham dies after 'brief and sudden illness'
stories.summary: Donald Trump paid tribute to the 71-year-old South Carolina senator, calling him a "true American patriot" who will be "greatly missed".

stories.title: Badly burned British couple rescued from ravine during Spain wildfires, reports say
stories.summary: The unnamed pair were found semi-conscious with 40% burns after being trapped by the blazes raging through Almeria province, according to local media

stories.title: China evacuates nearly two million people as powerful typhoon makes landfall
stories.summary: Schools, work and outdoor activities have been suspended in Zhejiang province and many transport services cancelled.

stories.title: At least two killed in Toronto street festival shooting
stories.summary: Police say there was an exchange of gunfire between two individuals at the festival, and two firearms had been recovered from the scene.

stories.title: T. rex could become most expensive fossil ever - but it's a ​problem for scientists
stories.summary: A 67 million-year-old Tyrannosaurus rex will go on sale in New York with a pre-sale value of $30m.

stories.title: Stocks Sink in Broad AI Rout Sparked by China's DeepSeek
stories.summary: U.S. stocks were mostly lower, with the Nasdaq leading declines as makers of AI infrastructure suffered steep falls, many in the double digits. Nvidia was down 16%.

stories.title: Comex Gold, Silver Settle Lower
stories.summary: Gold settled 1.4% lower, down two of the past three sessions, and silver fell 2.5%, down three of the past four sessions.

stories.title: DeepSeek Won't Sink U.S. AI Titans
stories.summary: Panic fueling the selloff of Nvidia, Broadcom and other tech giants is overblown.

stories.title: Arabica Coffee Prices Hit Record on U.S., Colombia Tariff Spat
stories.summary: Arabica coffee prices hit a record level, as traders digested the withdrawal of President Trump’s threats to impose tariffs and economic sanctions on Colombia.

stories.title: Swiss franc, Japanese yen Rise as DeepSeek News Boosts Safe Havens
stories.summary: The Yen and Swiss Franc were stronger against the dollar as investors sought safe havens after Chinese start-up DeepSeek’s new AI model hit U.S. tech stocks.

stories.title: 'Funflation' hits home: Why staying in isn't the cost-saver it used to be
stories.summary: Following a wave of price hikes, at-home pastimes like streaming movies or playing video games are pinching pocketbooks.

stories.title: China consumer price growth weakens in June while producer inflation rises to near 4-year high
stories.summary: Investors increasingly view China's two-speed growth with robust export and tepid domestic demand as a defining long-term feature of the Chinese economy.

stories.title: Christine Lagarde leaves door open to early ECB exit, as she mulls French politics
stories.summary: The European Central Bank's Christine Lagarde has declined to rule out an early end to her term as president, as she mulls a foray into French politics.

stories.title: Job seekers giving up: Labor force participation rate falls to lowest in 50 years, outside of Covid era
stories.summary: A drop in the unemployment rate helped provide some upside to what was an otherwise downbeat jobs report — but it was for all the wrong reasons.

stories.title: U.S. job creation cools in June with payrolls growth of just 57,000; unemployment rate at 4.2%
stories.summary: Nonfarm payrolls were expected to rise by 115,000 in June and the unemployment rate to hold steady at 4.3%.

stories.title: Europe wants to rebalance trade with Beijing, but can't quit Chinese air conditioners
stories.summary: A historic heat wave has driven unprecedented demand for Chinese-made air conditioners in Europe, underscoring the tough task Brussels faces in rebalancing trade with Beijing.

stories.title: The real mystery behind Moana: After 1,700 years, why did Polynesians suddenly sail east?

stories.title: Increased drone surveillance of illegal July 4th fireworks led to $100K fine

stories.title: China recovered its first reusable rocket and showed a new way to do it
stories.summary: "Clearly, they admire the work that's being done by SpaceX and are trying to replicate it."

stories.title: Pakistan crypto chief seeks dialogue after scholar rules against crypto payments

stories.title: Cambridge study puts Ethereum near the lower end of PoS energy intensity
